message:
fix(membrane): fix EBR reclaim off-by-one and TLS-cached handle UAF hazard

Two correctness fixes in epoch-based reclamation:

1. ebr.rs: The reclaim bucket calculation used (current % 3) which
   reclaims items from only one epoch ago (unsafe — items may still
   be referenced by threads in the previous epoch). Fixed to
   (current + 1) % 3, correctly reclaiming items retired two epochs
   ago per the standard EBR protocol.

2. ptr_validator.rs: The TLS cache stored (usize collector_id,
   EbrHandle) where the usize was the raw address of the owning
   ValidationPipeline. If that pipeline was dropped, the address
   could be reused by a new allocation, causing a stale handle to
   match (use-after-free). Fixed by storing (Arc<QuarantineEbr>,
   EbrHandle) — the Arc prevents the collector from being freed
   while any TLS handle still references it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
